creator: chris@uminac.com
text:
The tws driver is not currently in the source tree.  The driver source, however, is on LSI's web site and appears to be BSD licensed.

Fix: 

The driver is available at the following location in both binary and source formats for specific versions of FreeBSD, including 8.1-RELEASE: 

http://www.lsi.com/channel/products/raid_controllers/3ware_9750-8e/index.html
How-To-Repeat: I noticed this when trying to make use of a 3Ware 9750-8e device.
